items.title: I’ve never seen a head on a stick for any player on any Summer League team before. I didn’t expect my first to be Norchad Omier.
items.author: Basketball Poetry
items.body_excerpt:
I’ve never seen a head on a stick for any player on any Summer League team before. I didn’t expect my first to be Norchad Omier.

More on Caleb Wilson, Egor Demin, Yang Hansen, craps, and CeraVe from my Summer League Diaries:
